name: Hot Dogs Revisited (Glamour Dogs) by Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the hot dogs.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Split the hot dogs lengthwise and place them in a baking dish.
4. Fill each hot dog with the mixture.
5. Bake for about 12 minutes.
